name: llm-cost-skills
description: Free, open-source Claude Agent Skills for LLM cost and FinOps: estimate token spend, tear down a usage CSV, find prompt-caching wins, audit context bloat, advise model downgrades, and spot Batch API savings. The free, one-shot versions of what cost.botzone.ai does continuously.

plugins.name: llm-cost-skills
plugins.description: A bundle of LLM cost / FinOps skills. Each one analyses a single prompt, run, or usage export and surfaces a concrete dollar number: spend-teardown (parse a provider usage CSV into a ranked savings list), prompt-caching-advisor, context-bloat-auditor, model-downgrade-advisor, and batch-api-advisor. Install once to get all of them.
